name: design-scraper
description: Scrape and organize design inspiration assets from Dribbble, Mobbin, App Store, Behance, Pinterest, and Awwwards, then synthesize them into a reusable mobile-first design contract and platform guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Scrape inspiration and build design handoff
interface.longDescription: Collect design inspiration from supported sources, download original assets when possible, organize them into a local library, run post-processing for color extraction, dedupe, and preview generation, then synthesize the results into a reusable mobile-first design contract and platform guidance.
defaultPrompt: Scrape these Dribbble links into a local project folder.
Save inspiration assets from these design URLs.
Download and organize these design references.
Turn this scrape into a mobile-first design contract and platform guidance.
